description.simple: A length of cut wood — fuel and lumber both.
Rough quarried stone — heavy and slow to shape, but lasting.
A simple hand axe — useful for chopping wood.
A heavy pickaxe — useful for breaking stone.
A bleak omen anchored to the world. Feed it dread to lift it; ignore it and it lingers.
A burst of effort pinned to the world. Channel corpus into it to see it through.
The subtle essence — the spark of magic in a soul.
Aether kindled brighter than rest. A surplus.
Aether spent. Will recover in time.
The animating spirit — will and intent.
Spirit stoked beyond its usual flame.
Spirit spent. Will recover in time.
The body's vigor — physical capacity and health.
Vigor heightened beyond rest. A surplus of strength.
Body spent. Will recover in time.
Trained skill and cleverness — the cunning hand and quick wit.
Skill sharpened past its usual edge.
Skill spent. Will recover in time.
A clinging fear that resists being put down.
An ordinary mortal — adaptable, balanced across every faculty.
Light forest — passable, but slower than open ground.
Dense forest — costly to cross.
A boulder of useful stone. Break it apart with a pickaxe.
A standing tree. Cut it down with an axe for logs.
